summary: The test suite covers basic matrix generation logic well but has critical gaps: no error-handling tests, missing CLI/file-I/O validation, and act tests rely on undefined magic strings (e.g., 'BASIC_COMBINATIONS=4') that don't appear in the shown implementation. Tests assume fixtures and workflow outputs exist but don't verify them. Code bugs: workflow-structure.test.ts uses both Bun.file().toString() (non-functional) and require('fs'), mixing paradigms. act-tests.test.ts runs all fixtures in one beforeAll(), making it impossible to isolate which fixture fails. Missing: config validation errors, malformed JSON handling, actual JSON output structure assertions, boundary cases (empty dimension arrays), and include+exclude interaction tests. Would fail to catch regressions in error paths and only tests happy-path scenarios.
